Package noppes.npcs.api.ability

Interface IAbility

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbilityAction
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IAbilityCharge, IAbilityCounter, IAbilityCutter, IAbilityDash, IAbilityDefend, IAbilityDisc, IAbilityDodge, IAbilityEffect, IAbilityEnergyBeam, IAbilityEnergyProjectile, IAbilityGuard, IAbilityHazard, IAbilityHeavyHit, IAbilityLaser, IAbilityOrb, IAbilityProjectile, IAbilityShockwave, IAbilitySlam, IAbilitySweeper, IAbilityTeleport, IAbilityTrap, IAbilityVortex, IAbilityZone, ICustomAbility
    public interface IAbility
extends IAbilityAction
    Interface for NPC abilities. Abilities are special attacks or actions that NPCs can perform during combat.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getAllowedByType()
      Get the allowed user type for this ability.
      int getBurstAmount()  
      int getBurstDelay()  
      int getCooldownTicks()
      Get the cooldown time in ticks.
      int getCurrentTick()
      Get the current tick within the current phase.
      int getDazedTicks()
      Get the dazed time in ticks (stun after interrupt during WINDUP).
      String getDisplayName()
      Get the display name (cosmetic).
      String getId()
      Get the unique ID (UUID for custom abilities, registry key for built-in).
      int getLockMovementType()
      Get the lock movement type for this ability.
      IMagicData getMagicData()
      Get this ability's magic data.
      float getMaxRange()
      Get the maximum range at which this ability can be used.
      float getMinRange()
      Get the minimum range at which this ability can be used.
      String getName()
      Get the unique identifier/name of this ability (used for file naming, commands, search).
      INbt getNbt()
      Get this ability's data as NBT.
      int getPhaseInt()
      Get the current execution phase (0=IDLE, 1=WINDUP, 2=ACTIVE, 3=DAZED, 4=BURST_DELAY).
      int getRotationModeType()
      Get the rotation mode for this ability.
      int getRotationPhaseType()
      Get the rotation phase for this ability (when rotation mode applies).
      String getToggleStateLabel​(int state)
      Get the display label for a specific toggle state (1-indexed).
      int getToggleStates()
      Get the number of toggle states.
      float getTrackSpeedValue()
      Get track speed for TRACK rotation mode (blocks/second).
      String getTypeId()
      Get the type ID of this ability (e.g., "cnpc:slam", "cnpc:beam").
      int getWeight()
      Get the selection weight for random ability selection.
      int getWindUpTicks()
      Get the wind-up time in ticks (telegraph phase).
      boolean isBurstEnabled()  
      boolean isBurstOverlap()  
      boolean isBurstReplayAnimations()  
      boolean isEnabled()
      Check if this ability is enabled.
      boolean isExecuting()
      Check if this ability is currently being executed.
      boolean isIgnoreCooldown()
      Check if this ability ignores cooldowns.
      boolean isIgnoreIFrames()
      Check if this ability ignores target invulnerability frames (hurt resistance).
      boolean isInterruptible()
      Check if this ability can be interrupted by damage.
      boolean isMovementLockedDuringActive()
      Check if movement (pathfinding/motion) is locked during the ACTIVE phase.
      boolean isMovementLockedDuringWindup()
      Check if movement (pathfinding/motion) is locked during the WINDUP phase.
      boolean isPerAbilityCooldown()
      Check if this ability uses per-ability cooldown instead of global cooldown.
      boolean isRotationLockedDuringActive()
      Check if rotation (yaw/pitch) is locked during the ACTIVE phase.
      boolean isRotationLockedDuringWindup()
      Check if rotation (yaw/pitch) is locked during the WINDUP phase.
      boolean isToggleable()
      Check if this ability is toggleable (has at least 1 toggle state).
      void setAllowedByType​(int type)
      Set the allowed user type for this ability.
      void setBurstAmount​(int amount)  
      void setBurstDelay​(int delay)  
      void setBurstEnabled​(boolean enabled)  
      void setBurstOverlap​(boolean overlap)  
      void setBurstReplayAnimations​(boolean replay)  
      void setCooldownTicks​(int ticks)
      Set the cooldown time in ticks.
      void setDazedTicks​(int ticks)
      Set the dazed time in ticks.
      void setDisplayName​(String displayName)
      Set the display name (cosmetic).
      void setEnabled​(boolean enabled)
      Enable or disable this ability.
      void setId​(String id)
      Set the unique ID of this ability instance.
      void setIgnoreCooldown​(boolean ignore)
      Set whether this ability ignores cooldowns.
      void setIgnoreIFrames​(boolean ignore)
      Set whether this ability ignores target invulnerability frames (hurt resistance).
      void setInterruptible​(boolean interruptible)
      Set whether this ability can be interrupted.
      void setLockMovementType​(int type)
      Set the lock movement type for this ability.
      void setMaxRange​(float range)
      Set the maximum range.
      void setMinRange​(float range)
      Set the minimum range.
      void setName​(String name)
      Set the unique identifier/name of this ability.
      void setNbt​(INbt nbt)
      Set this ability's data from NBT.
      void setPerAbilityCooldown​(boolean perAbility)
      Set whether this ability uses per-ability cooldown.
      void setRotationModeType​(int type)
      Set the rotation mode for this ability.
      void setRotationPhaseType​(int type)
      Set the rotation phase for this ability.
      void setToggleStates​(int states)
      Set the number of toggle states.
      void setTrackSpeedValue​(float speed)
      Set track speed for TRACK rotation mode (blocks/second).
      void setWeight​(int weight)
      Set the selection weight.
      void setWindUpTicks​(int ticks)
      Set the wind-up time in ticks.

      • Methods inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.ability.IAbilityAction

        isChain

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        String getId()
        Get the unique ID (UUID for custom abilities, registry key for built-in). This is the stable reference that never changes after creation.
        Returns:
        the unique ability ID

      • setId

        void setId​(String id)
        Set the unique ID of this ability instance.
        Parameters:
        id - Unique ability ID.

      • getName

        String getName()
        Get the unique identifier/name of this ability (used for file naming, commands, search).
        Specified by:
        getName in interface IAbilityAction
        Returns:
        The unique identifier/name of this action.

      • setName

        void setName​(String name)
        Set the unique identifier/name of this ability.
        Parameters:
        name - Unique identifier.

      • getDisplayName

        String getDisplayName()
        Get the display name (cosmetic). Falls back to getName() if not set.
        Returns:
        the display name

      • setDisplayName

        void setDisplayName​(String displayName)
        Set the display name (cosmetic). Pass empty string to use getName() as display.
        Parameters:
        displayName - Display name, or empty string for default.

      • getTypeId

        String getTypeId()
        Get the type ID of this ability (e.g., "cnpc:slam", "cnpc:beam").
        Returns:
        the type ID

      • isEnabled

        boolean isEnabled()
        Check if this ability is enabled.
        Specified by:
        isEnabled in interface IAbilityAction
        Returns:
        Whether this action is enabled.

      • setEnabled

        void setEnabled​(boolean enabled)
        Enable or disable this ability.
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether the ability is enabled.

      • getWeight

        int getWeight()
        Get the selection weight for random ability selection. Higher weight = more likely to be selected.
        Specified by:
        getWeight in interface IAbilityAction
        Returns:
        Selection weight for random ability selection (higher = more likely).

      • setWeight

        void setWeight​(int weight)
        Set the selection weight.
        Parameters:
        weight - Selection weight (higher = more likely).

      • getMinRange

        float getMinRange()
        Get the minimum range at which this ability can be used.
        Specified by:
        getMinRange in interface IAbilityAction
        Returns:
        Minimum range in blocks at which this action can be used.

      • setMinRange

        void setMinRange​(float range)
        Set the minimum range.
        Parameters:
        range - Minimum range in blocks.

      • getMaxRange

        float getMaxRange()
        Get the maximum range at which this ability can be used.
        Specified by:
        getMaxRange in interface IAbilityAction
        Returns:
        Maximum range in blocks at which this action can be used.

      • setMaxRange

        void setMaxRange​(float range)
        Set the maximum range.
        Parameters:
        range - Maximum range in blocks.

      • getCooldownTicks

        int getCooldownTicks()
        Get the cooldown time in ticks.
        Specified by:
        getCooldownTicks in interface IAbilityAction
        Returns:
        Cooldown duration in ticks after this action is used.

      • setCooldownTicks

        void setCooldownTicks​(int ticks)
        Set the cooldown time in ticks.
        Parameters:
        ticks - Cooldown duration in ticks.

      • getWindUpTicks

        int getWindUpTicks()
        Get the wind-up time in ticks (telegraph phase).
        Returns:
        wind-up time in ticks

      • setWindUpTicks

        void setWindUpTicks​(int ticks)
        Set the wind-up time in ticks.
        Parameters:
        ticks - Wind-up duration in ticks.

      • getDazedTicks

        int getDazedTicks()
        Get the dazed time in ticks (stun after interrupt during WINDUP).
        Returns:
        dazed time in ticks

      • setDazedTicks

        void setDazedTicks​(int ticks)
        Set the dazed time in ticks.
        Parameters:
        ticks - Dazed duration in ticks.

      • isInterruptible

        boolean isInterruptible()
        Check if this ability can be interrupted by damage.
        Returns:
        true if interruptible

      • setInterruptible

        void setInterruptible​(boolean interruptible)
        Set whether this ability can be interrupted.
        Parameters:
        interruptible - Whether the ability is interruptible.

      • isIgnoreIFrames

        boolean isIgnoreIFrames()
        Check if this ability ignores target invulnerability frames (hurt resistance).
        Returns:
        true if ignoring invulnerability frames

      • setIgnoreIFrames

        void setIgnoreIFrames​(boolean ignore)
        Set whether this ability ignores target invulnerability frames (hurt resistance).
        Parameters:
        ignore - Whether to ignore invulnerability frames.

      • getLockMovementType

        int getLockMovementType()
        Get the lock movement type for this ability.
        Returns:
        0=NO, 1=WINDUP, 2=ACTIVE, 3=WINDUP_AND_ACTIVE

      • setLockMovementType

        void setLockMovementType​(int type)
        Set the lock movement type for this ability.
        Parameters:
        type - 0=NO, 1=WINDUP, 2=ACTIVE, 3=WINDUP_AND_ACTIVE

      • getRotationModeType

        int getRotationModeType()
        Get the rotation mode for this ability.
        Returns:
        0=FREE, 1=LOCKED, 2=TRACK

      • setRotationModeType

        void setRotationModeType​(int type)
        Set the rotation mode for this ability.
        Parameters:
        type - 0=FREE, 1=LOCKED, 2=TRACK

      • getRotationPhaseType

        int getRotationPhaseType()
        Get the rotation phase for this ability (when rotation mode applies).
        Returns:
        0=NO, 1=WINDUP, 2=ACTIVE, 3=WINDUP_AND_ACTIVE

      • setRotationPhaseType

        void setRotationPhaseType​(int type)
        Set the rotation phase for this ability.
        Parameters:
        type - 0=NO, 1=WINDUP, 2=ACTIVE, 3=WINDUP_AND_ACTIVE

      • getTrackSpeedValue

        float getTrackSpeedValue()
        Get track speed for TRACK rotation mode (blocks/second). 0 = instant tracking. Comparable to player sprint speed (~5.6 blocks/sec).
        Returns:
        track speed in blocks/second

      • setTrackSpeedValue

        void setTrackSpeedValue​(float speed)
        Set track speed for TRACK rotation mode (blocks/second).
        Parameters:
        speed - 0 = instant tracking. ~4 = dodgeable while sprinting. ~6 = barely undodgeable.

      • isMovementLockedDuringWindup

        boolean isMovementLockedDuringWindup()
        Check if movement (pathfinding/motion) is locked during the WINDUP phase.
        Returns:
        true if movement is locked during windup

      • isMovementLockedDuringActive

        boolean isMovementLockedDuringActive()
        Check if movement (pathfinding/motion) is locked during the ACTIVE phase.
        Returns:
        true if movement is locked during active phase

      • isRotationLockedDuringWindup

        boolean isRotationLockedDuringWindup()
        Check if rotation (yaw/pitch) is locked during the WINDUP phase.
        Returns:
        true if rotation is locked during windup

      • isRotationLockedDuringActive

        boolean isRotationLockedDuringActive()
        Check if rotation (yaw/pitch) is locked during the ACTIVE phase.
        Returns:
        true if rotation is locked during active phase

      • isExecuting

        boolean isExecuting()
        Check if this ability is currently being executed.
        Returns:
        true if currently executing

      • getPhaseInt

        int getPhaseInt()
        Get the current execution phase (0=IDLE, 1=WINDUP, 2=ACTIVE, 3=DAZED, 4=BURST_DELAY).
        Returns:
        the current phase ordinal

      • getCurrentTick

        int getCurrentTick()
        Get the current tick within the current phase.
        Returns:
        the current tick within the phase

      • getAllowedByType

        int getAllowedByType()
        Get the allowed user type for this ability.
        Returns:
        0=NPC_ONLY, 1=PLAYER_ONLY, 2=BOTH

      • setAllowedByType

        void setAllowedByType​(int type)
        Set the allowed user type for this ability.
        Parameters:
        type - 0=NPC_ONLY, 1=PLAYER_ONLY, 2=BOTH

      • isIgnoreCooldown

        boolean isIgnoreCooldown()
        Check if this ability ignores cooldowns.
        Returns:
        true if ignoring cooldowns

      • setIgnoreCooldown

        void setIgnoreCooldown​(boolean ignore)
        Set whether this ability ignores cooldowns.
        Parameters:
        ignore - Whether to ignore cooldowns.

      • isPerAbilityCooldown

        boolean isPerAbilityCooldown()
        Check if this ability uses per-ability cooldown instead of global cooldown. When true, using this ability only puts THIS ability on cooldown, not all abilities.
        Returns:
        true if using per-ability cooldown

      • setPerAbilityCooldown

        void setPerAbilityCooldown​(boolean perAbility)
        Set whether this ability uses per-ability cooldown.
        Parameters:
        perAbility - Whether to use per-ability cooldown.

      • getNbt

        INbt getNbt()
        Get this ability's data as NBT.
        Returns:
        the ability's NBT data

      • setNbt

        void setNbt​(INbt nbt)
        Set this ability's data from NBT.
        Parameters:
        nbt - NBT data to load.

      • isBurstEnabled

        boolean isBurstEnabled()
        Returns:
        Whether burst firing is enabled (fires multiple instances in rapid succession).

      • setBurstEnabled

        void setBurstEnabled​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether burst firing is enabled.

      • getBurstAmount

        int getBurstAmount()
        Returns:
        Number of times the ability fires per burst.

      • setBurstAmount

        void setBurstAmount​(int amount)
        Parameters:
        amount - Number of shots per burst.

      • getBurstDelay

        int getBurstDelay()
        Returns:
        Delay in ticks between each burst shot.

      • setBurstDelay

        void setBurstDelay​(int delay)
        Parameters:
        delay - Delay in ticks between burst shots.

      • isBurstReplayAnimations

        boolean isBurstReplayAnimations()
        Returns:
        Whether animations replay for each burst shot.

      • setBurstReplayAnimations

        void setBurstReplayAnimations​(boolean replay)
        Parameters:
        replay - Whether to replay animations per burst shot.

      • isBurstOverlap

        boolean isBurstOverlap()
        Returns:
        Whether burst shots can overlap (fire before previous shot ends).

      • setBurstOverlap

        void setBurstOverlap​(boolean overlap)
        Parameters:
        overlap - Whether burst shots can overlap.

      • isToggleable

        boolean isToggleable()
        Check if this ability is toggleable (has at least 1 toggle state).
        Returns:
        true if toggleable

      • getToggleStates

        int getToggleStates()
        Get the number of toggle states. 0 = not toggleable, 1 = binary on/off, 2+ = multi-state cycling.
        Returns:
        number of toggle states

      • setToggleStates

        void setToggleStates​(int states)
        Set the number of toggle states. 0 = not toggleable, 1 = binary on/off, 2+ = multi-state cycling.
        Parameters:
        states - Number of toggle states.

      • getToggleStateLabel

        String getToggleStateLabel​(int state)
        Get the display label for a specific toggle state (1-indexed).
        Parameters:
        state - Toggle state number (1-indexed).
        Returns:
        the label, or null if none set.

      • getMagicData

        IMagicData getMagicData()
        Get this ability's magic data. Defines magic types, damage splits, and flat magic damage for this ability. Inherited by spawned energy entities.
        Returns:
        the ability's magic data
